page.seo_title: About Us - Premium Spanish Learning Platform
page.seo_description: Learn about Spanish Class, our mission to make Spanish language learning accessible, engaging, and culturally immersive. Certified teachers, personalized learning plans, and a supportive community of language enthusiasts.
page.title: Our Story
page.subtitle: We believe that learning Spanish should be more than memorizing grammar rules. It's about discovering a new culture, connecting with millions of speakers worldwide, and opening doors to incredible opportunities.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: At Spanish Class, our mission is to make Spanish language learning accessible, engaging, and culturally immersive for students worldwide. We combine expert teaching with modern technology to create a premium learning experience that fits your lifestyle.
mission.paragraph2: Whether you're preparing for DELE exams, planning to study abroad, or simply passionate about Hispanic culture, we're here to guide you every step of the way.
mission.reason_1: Certified teachers with years of experience
mission.reason_2: Personalized learning plans for every student
mission.reason_3: Flexible scheduling that fits your lifestyle
mission.reason_5: Modern platform for seamless booking experience

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do at Spanish Class
values.passion_description: We love helping students discover the beauty of the Spanish language and Hispanic culture.
values.personalized_description: Every student has unique goals. We create customized learning plans tailored to your needs.
values.community_description: Learning is better together. Join a supportive community of Spanish language enthusiasts.
values.cultural_description: Experience authentic Spanish culture through language, not just grammar and vocabulary.

timeline.title: Growing & Evolving
timeline.subtitle: Our milestones on the path to serving you better
timeline.2020_description: Started with a vision to make Spanish learning accessible and engaging online.
timeline.2021_description: Reached our first major milestone with students from 15 different countries.
timeline.2023_description: Became an authorized DELE exam preparation center.
timeline.2026_description: Launched our modern booking platform for seamless class scheduling.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Spanish Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join our community of passionate learners and experience the difference of personalized, culturally-immersive Spanish education.
cta.features: Professional teachers • Flexible scheduling • Personalized learning

contact.seo_description: Get in touch with Spanish Class. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible. We're here to answer your questions about our Spanish learning platform.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our Spanish classes? We're here to help. Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contact.form_success_message: Thank you for contacting us. We'll respond within 24 hours.
